title: quercus × sampaioana
intro: Quercus × sampaioana, also known as Sampaio's oak or hybrid oak, is a rare, sterile hybrid plant resulting from the cross between the Portuguese oak (Quercus faginea) and the Pyrenean oak (Quercus pyrenaica). This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to protect the body from oxidative stress and inflammation. The health benefits of Quercus × sampaioana include its potential to support cardiovascular health, boost the immune system, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Quercus × sampaioana can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized and its health benefits to be harnessed.
